codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly disables all MCP tool registration while preserving channel notification relay functionality. The New() function in server.go no longer calls registerTools or registerChannelTools, with a clear comment explaining the intentional zero-tool design. Tests were appropriately updated to assert zero tools are registered and that previously-registered tools are now unavailable. All validators passed (go build, go test, go vet).

summary: PASS - The disable-mcp-tools feature was implemented correctly and completely. The MCP server now registers zero tools as required by VAL-MCP-001, while preserving all channel notification relay functionality as required by VAL-MCP-002. Code changes: (1) Removed registerTools and registerChannelTools calls from New() in server.go with explanatory comment. (2) Updated server_test.go to assert ListTools returns zero tools. (3) Updated tools_channel_test.go to verify the 'report' tool is no longer registered. All verification steps passed: go build ./..., go test (filtered), and go vet ./... all exit 0. The worker followed the go-worker skill procedure correctly with no deviations. No code issues found, no shared state gaps identified.
